candidate.defect_class: NIST table duplicate suppression and false-positive table handling

summary: QID table-row reconstruction now falls back to the raw classifier text when PyMuPDF line repair has narrowed a body row and dropped leading cells.
Table-contained suppression now treats full-width rows as covered when y-axis overlap is high and the row spans the table x-range, matching the snapshot suppression path.
The false-positive-table regression now expects the current ledger contract for NIST running headers: top running header text is page chrome, not a section heading.

not_run: full test_nist set after page28 fixture recovery
fresh model-backed reviewer run for remaining page candidates
